title: aspidium ammifolium
intro: Aspidium ammifolium, also known as the Lady fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aspidium ammifolium include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
